Account.description: An account is an entity that can represent either one contact, or multiple contacts. An account must contain at least one primary contact

display_name.description: This is the display name for the contact. It is set automatically based on the user settings in the UI This is the display name for the contact. It is set automatically based on the user settings in the UI

number.description: This is the account number. If Auto-Numbering is turned on you can leave this field blank and PracticePanther will automatically assign the next available number

company_name.description: Should be set only if this account represents a company

company_custom_field_values.description: This is a list of custom field values related to this company. Can only be used if company_name is set for this account

assigned_to_users.description: At least one user must be assigned to this matter. You can get the current user using get at /users/me

created_at.description: updated_at can be used to sync contacts with PracticePanther. updated_at can be used to sync contacts with PracticePanther.

updated_at.description: updated_at can be used to sync contacts with PracticePanther. updated_at can be used to sync contacts with PracticePanther.

notes.description: These are company notes and can only be used if company_name is set for this account

primary_contact.description: This is the primary contact for this account

other_contacts.description: If this account is a company, this will include any additional contacts other than the primary contact, if any

custom_field_ref.description: This is a reference to the custom field we are setting this value for.

value_date_time.description: Used only if CustomField.Type == Date || CustomField.Type == DateTime

value_number.description: Used only if CustomField.Type == Number || CustomField.Type == Currency

value_string.description: Used only if CustomField.Type == TextEditor || CustomField.Type == DropDownList

Contact.description: Represents a contact. Each account can have multiple contacts. One of them must be the primary contact

is_primary_contact.description: This will be set to true if this contact is a primary contact for the account This will be set to true if this contact is a primary contact for the account

display_name.description: This is the display name for the contact. It is read-only and set automatically based on the user settings in the UI This is the display name for the contact. It is read-only and set automatically based on the user settings in the UI

phone_mobile.description: This will be used to send text message reminders and notifications to this contact

email.description: Must be a valid email address

notes.description: Can be either plain text or HTML.

custom_field_values.description: This is a list of custom field values related to this contact

status.description: Determines if this contact's account is active or archived. Determines if this contact's account is active or archived.

BankAccount.description: Represents a bank account, either trust or operating. Each payment must be related to a bank account.

number.description: This is the matter number. If Auto-Numbering is turned on you can leave this field blank and PracticePanther will automatically assign the next available number

display_name.description: This is the display name for the matter. It is set automatically based on the user settings in the UI This is the display name for the matter. It is set automatically based on the user settings in the UI

name.description: This is the name of the matter, for example John vs. Jane

notes.description: Matter notes, can be either plain text or HTML

status.description: Determines if this matter is open, closed or pending.

assigned_to_users.description: At least one user must be assigned to this matter. You can get the current user using get at /users/me

custom_field_values.description: This is a list of custom field values related to this matter

created_at.description: updated_at can be used to sync matters with PracticePanther. updated_at can be used to sync matters with PracticePanther.

updated_at.description: updated_at can be used to sync matters with PracticePanther. updated_at can be used to sync matters with PracticePanther.

dropdown_list_values.description: If the value_type == 'DropDownList' this will contain all available options to select from, comma separated.

help_text.description: This value of help_text is shown as help text in the PracticePanther UI below the input field when adding this custom field.

tooltip.description: The value of tooltip is shown as a question mark in the PracticePanther UI next to the custom field name when adding this field.

body_text.description: The plain text body of the email.

body_html.description: The html body of the email. For performance reasons, will only be returned when GET is called for a single email.

external_message_id.description: The message Id for an external program. For example, the Exchange message Id.

external_thread_id.description: The thread or conversation Id for an external program. For example, the Gmail thread Id.

is_billable.description: If set to billable, it will be automatically queued to be added to the next invoice. If this is set to false, it will show in PracticePanther as not billable

is_billed.description: If set to billed, it will not be added to future invoices and will be marked as "billed" in PracticePanther

date.description: This is the date for this expense and will be visible to the client if this expense is billable. The date field can be used to run reports on expenses in PracticePanther.

description.description: This is the description which will be visible on the invoice

private_notes.description: These are private notes that are visible to PracticePanther users but will not be added to the invoice

billed_by_user_ref.description: The user who billed this time entry, this field is optional. If you want to get the current user information you can use GET /users/me

expense_category_ref.description: This field is optional. If set will add an expense category for this expense.

task_code.description: Optional UTBMS task code (e.g. "L110"). When provided on create/edit, links this expense to the matching UTBMS code. Returned on read if a UTBMS code is associated.

is_billable.description: If set to billable, it will be automatically queued to be added to the next invoice. If this is set to false, it will show in PracticePanther as not billable

is_billed.description: If set to billed, it will not be added to future invoices and will be marked as "billed" in PracticePanther

date.description: This is the date for this time entry and will be visible to the client if this time entry is billable. The date field can be used to run reports on time entries in PracticePanther.

qty.description: The quantity for this flat fee.

price.description: This is the price for this flat fee. Will be used together with quantity to calculate the total amount for this flat fee. If you leave this field blank, PracticePanther will automatically use the default item rate

description.description: This is the description which will be visible to the client on the invoice

private_notes.description: These are private notes that are visible to PracticePanther users but will not be added to the invoice

billed_by_user_ref.description: The user who billed this time entry, this field is required. If you want to get the current user information you can use GET /users/me

item_ref.description: This is a reference to the item related to this time entry, This is field is not required, to get all available items you can GET /items

created_at.description: This field can be used to sync time entries with PracticePanther. This field can be used to sync time entries with PracticePanther.

updated_at.description: This field can be used to sync time entries with PracticePanther. This field can be used to sync time entries with PracticePanther.

issue_date.description: This is the issue date for the invoice. ie. the date this invoice was created

due_date.description: This is the due date for the invoice. If due_date is in the past and amount_due > 0, then this invoice is overdue.

invoice_type.description: Determines if this is a sale invoice, refund or credit note.

created_at.description: This field can be used to sync invoices with PracticePanther. This field can be used to sync invoices with PracticePanther.

updated_at.description: This field can be used to sync invoices with PracticePanther. This field can be used to sync invoices with PracticePanther.

matter_ref.description: If this is a payment that can be used for this account by all matters related to this account, you can leave this field empty. If this can be used only for a specific matter, you can set the matter reference here

number.description: This is the payment number. Leave this blank to have PracticePanther automatically set the next available number

date.description: The date field can be used to run reports on payments in PracticePanther.

total_amount.description: This is the amount of this payment

unapplied_amount.description: This is the amount of the payment that has not yet been applied on any invoices

bank_account.description: This field is a reference to the bank account this payment is related to. You can use bank_account.type to determing if this is a Trust or Operating payment.

created_at.description: This field can be used to sync payments with PracticePanther. This field can be used to sync payments with PracticePanther.

updated_at.description: This field can be used to sync payments with PracticePanther. This field can be used to sync payments with PracticePanther.

matter_ref.description: If this is a payment that can be used for this account by all matters related to this account, you can leave this field empty. If this can be used only for a specific matter, you can set the matter reference here

number.description: This is the payment number. Leave this blank to have PracticePanther automatically set the next available number

date.description: The date field can be used to run reports on payments in PracticePanther.

total_amount.description: This is the amount of this payment

unapplied_amount.description: This is the amount of the payment that has not yet been applied on any invoices

bank_account.description: This field is a reference to the bank account this payment is related to. You can use bank_account.type to determing if this is a Trust or Operating payment.

created_at.description: This field can be used to sync payments with PracticePanther. This field can be used to sync payments with PracticePanther.

updated_at.description: This field can be used to sync payments with PracticePanther. This field can be used to sync payments with PracticePanther.

name.description: The name field is used to describe what kind of a relationship this is between a contact or a matter. For example, judge, opposing counsel etc.

notes.description: This field can be used to add any additional notes about this relationship

is_billable.description: If set to billable, it will be automatically queued to be added to the next invoice. If this is set to false, it will show in PracticePanther as not billable

is_billed.description: If set to billed, it will not be added to future invoices and will be marked as "billed" in PracticePanther

date.description: This is the date for this time entry and will be visible to the client if this time entry is billable. The date field can be used to run reports on time entries in PracticePanther.

hours.description: The number of hours worked on this time entry. For example, an hour and a half will be added as 1.5, fifteen minutes will be added as 0.25.

rate.description: This is the hourly rate for this time entry. Will be used together with hours to calculate the total billable for this time entry. If you leave this field blank, PracticePanther will automatically add the default hourly rate for the user and matter

description.description: This is the description which will be visible to the client on the invoice

private_notes.description: These are private notes that are visible to PracticePanther users but will not be added to the invoice

billed_by_user_ref.description: The user who billed this time entry, this field is required. If you want to get the current user information you can use GET /users/me

item_ref.description: This is a reference to the item related to this time entry, This is field is not required, to get all available items you can GET /items

task_code.description: Optional UTBMS task code (e.g. "L110"). When provided on create/edit, links this time entry to the matching UTBMS code. Returned on read if a UTBMS code is associated.

created_at.description: This field can be used to sync time entries with PracticePanther. This field can be used to sync time entries with PracticePanther.

updated_at.description: This field can be used to sync time entries with PracticePanther. This field can be used to sync time entries with PracticePanther.
